name: Deep-Fried Squid
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the squid, removing skin and ink sacs.
2. Cut into 1/2-inch rings.
3. Sprinkle lemon juice, salt, and white pepper on the squid.
4. Combine milk and egg in a shallow dish.
5. Dip each piece of squid into the milk mixture, then roll in flour.
6. Heat oil for deep frying to 350°F (175°C).
7. Place coated squid in a single layer into hot oil and fry until lightly browned, about 3 to 5 minutes.
8. Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve with lemon wedges.
